creator: kbyanc@posi.net
text:
The gwstat port no longer builds and doubtably ever will again...the program is no longer being supported nor maintained at 
http://dis.cs.umass.edu/stats/ and thus most of the distfiles (well at least stats.map) can no longer be obtained.

Fix: 

Either:
	a) remove the port
	b) find a generous soul who has the missing files and put them on freebsd.org, patching the Makefile to only list the freebsd.org
site in DISTFILES
	c) find an event more generous soul who'll put the files on a public server and patch the Makefile to list their server in
DISTFILES


  Kelly
 ~kbyanc@posi.net~
